ip_outcome_note: Depicted figure matches Kagamine Rin's canonical School Swimwear module from Hatsune Miku: Project DIVA F — short blond hair (module-altered to neck-length), solid blue school swimsuit (navy), warm casual pose. Module confirmed via Project DIVA Wiki (Fandom). The card is a licensed Weiss Schwarz product; Kagamine Rin is a Crypton Future Media / Yamaha VOCALOID character. Not an external IP crossover risk.

trivia_bullets.text: Kagamine Rin's "School Swimwear" module is a specific unlockable costume in Hatsune Miku: Project DIVA F, earned by clearing all songs on Hard difficulty and purchasing for 60,000 DIVA Points — one of the more expensive unlocks in the game. The module also appeared in Project DIVA F 2nd (unlocked by clearing 45 songs with Rin) and Project DIVA X. A distinguishing feature of the module is that Rin's hair shortens to neck-length from her standard cut. [Project DIVA Wiki: Kagamine Rin School Swimwear, via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Project DIVA Wiki (Fandom): Kagamine Rin School Swimwear module, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Kagamine Rin and Len were first released December 27, 2007 as Crypton Future Media's second Vocaloid vocal pair (CV02) for the VOCALOID2 engine. The name Kagamine (鏡音) means "mirrored sound" — Rin and Len were designed as mirror-image androids, a conceptual twin relationship that permeates their shared module-and-card design in the Project DIVA games and card sets. Both are voiced by Asami Shimoda. [Wikipedia: Kagamine Rin/Len, via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Wikipedia: Kagamine Rin/Len, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: The PD/S22 English set (Hatsune Miku -Project DIVA- f) released November 2013 as a Bushiroad Weiss Schwarz licensed expansion. Cards in the set depict in-game Module costumes from the PlayStation 3 rhythm title, making them essentially trading-card illustrations of specific unlockable in-game outfits rather than original character art. [WebSearch: Weiss Schwarz PD/S22 English retailer listings, Amazon Bushiroad Trial Deck]
sources: WebSearch: Weiss Schwarz PD/S22 retailer listings

trivia_bullets.text: Swimwear and casual-outfit module cards for Kagamine Rin appeared across multiple PD/S22 card variants; the School Swimwear variant (E087) is an Uncommon, while higher-rarity Rin cards in the same set depict the Stylish Energy and other modules. The module-art system means each rarity tier typically captures a different in-game costume. [WebSearch: Weiss Schwarz PD/S22 Kagamine Rin card listings]
sources: WebSearch: Weiss Schwarz PD/S22 Kagamine Rin listings including Stylish Energy R reference
